metadata.name: Onboard a New Property for Management

description: A property management company is taking over management of a new apartment building.

nodes.task_description: Collect all necessary documents from the property owner, including existing leases, tenant contact information, and vendor contracts.

expected_outcome.value: All required property and tenant data is collected.

nodes.task_description: Set up the new property, units, and tenants in the property management software.

expected_outcome.value: The property is fully and accurately set up in the system.

nodes.task_description: Send an introductory letter to all existing tenants informing them of the change in management and new procedures for paying rent and requesting maintenance.

expected_outcome.value: All tenants are successfully notified of the management change.
